summary: Frontend testing of Video-Led Lesson Workbench and 10-module CURRICULUM. All 17 test scenarios passed. Tested with paid user (sess_paid_1773353168) and non-paid user (sess_nopaid_test).
critical_code_review_comments: All 10 modules render correctly in sidebar with proper labels and lesson counts
VideoLessonWorkbench correctly shows video placeholder (not ReactPlayer) for all null videoUrls
ModuleOverviewCard renders for modules 2-9 with correct type-specific badges
seed_data_creation: Added cohort_access record for test_paid_user in MongoDB to enable paid user testing. Non-paid session (sess_nopaid_test) was already in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Paid user: session_token=sess_paid_1773353168 (has cohort_access record). Non-paid: sess_nopaid_test. Both exist in test_database. All Video Lesson Workbench features working correctly.

test_results.sidebar_10_modules: PASS - All 10 modules (Ground 0 through Module 9) present with correct data-testids
test_results.ground0_label: PASS - Shows 'The Mindset Module' and '6 lessons — UNLOCKED'
test_results.module1_sidebar: PASS - Shows 'Business & Authority Setup', '7 lessons — COHORT ACCESS' for paid user
test_results.module7_sidebar: PASS - Shows '4 lessons — RECOVERY' in orange
test_results.module8_sidebar: PASS - Shows '5 lessons — EXTENSION' in purple/indigo
test_results.video_placeholder: PASS - Shows 'VIDEO IN PRODUCTION' placeholder (not ReactPlayer error)
test_results.lesson_track_7_lessons: PASS - All 7 lessons (1.1 through 1.7) present in lesson track
test_results.lesson_1_3_click: PASS - Clicking 1.3 changes active lesson and shows 'Filing USDOT & Operating Authority'
test_results.lesson_1_1_resources: PASS - Supporting Resources section shown with /standards/new-entrant-packet link
test_results.lesson_1_2_no_resources: PASS - No Supporting Resources section for lesson 1.2
test_results.module8_extension_badge: PASS - Shows 'STANDARD EXTENSION — INCLUDED IN ENROLLMENT' badge
test_results.nonpaid_module1_payment: PASS - Non-paid user sees payment/lock screen (not workbench)
test_results.ground0_paid_user: PASS - Ground 0 content renders correctly for paid users
